name: Latakaranja (Fever Nut)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Vata.
mainMedicinalUses: Famous for treating malaria and recurring fevers.
Used for intestinal worms and abdominal pain.
plantProfile: Seeds are extremely hard and pebble-like.
preparationMethods: Seed powder taken with black pepper.
